KRISH SPEAKS • CREATOR • STORYTELLER •
The person behind the voice

I’m Gokulakrishnan Ravindren.

A business leader by profession, a storyteller by instinct.

My career spans sales, marketing and business development—building teams, identifying new opportunities, strengthening partnerships and using CRM and automation to improve performance. That professional curiosity became Krish Speaks: a place where research, context and compelling narration meet.

I explore culture, history, spirituality, places and the questions we inherit without examining. The goal is simple: make every viewer leave with one idea worth carrying forward.
